title: DeftAutoRestart
description: An autorestart plugin, that can be setup to restart your server at set times! Besides that u can also do manual restarts and so on!
body:
DeftAutoRestart is a powerful and feature-rich Paper plugin that provides automated server restart functionality with customizable announcements and visual effects. Perfect for server administrators who want to maintain server stability through regular restarts.

Key Features:
• Schedule multiple daily restarts at specific times
• Customizable countdown announcements with configurable intervals
• Rich visual feedback including:
  - Title messages
  - Action bar notifications
  - Boss bar countdown
  - Sound effects for different announcement stages
• Manual restart control with configurable countdown
• Automatic world saving before restart
• Player kick management with customizable messages
• Easy-to-use commands for server management

Commands:
• /dar reload - Reload the plugin configuration
• /dar restart [seconds] - Initiate a manual restart countdown
• /dar cancel - Cancel an ongoing restart
• /dar next - View the next scheduled restart
• /dar list - List all scheduled restarts

Configuration:
• Set multiple restart times in 24-hour format
• Customize announcement intervals and messages
• Configure visual effects and sound settings
• Adjust advanced settings like world saving and player kick behavior

Support:
• Join our Discord server for support
• Create a ticket for bug reports or feature requests
• Our team will assist you with any issues
• Regular updates and improvements based on community feedback

Perfect for:
• Server administrators who need automated maintenance
• Networks requiring regular server restarts
• Communities wanting clear communication about server restarts
• Anyone looking for a professional restart management solution

Requires Paper 1.21.1 or higher

Need help? Join our Discord and create a ticket - we're here to help!
